jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Narayana Health
jsonLd.description:
Narayana Health has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Noida office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Narayana Health:
Narayana Health is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health!
